children.name: Sub
children.content: Voice-cued, mission-scoped research · the agent searches the web, finds steps/URLs, and appends them as notes on a task · async with come-back-later + full error states

children.name: Hint
children.content: Everything you say is interpreted within this mission taxonomy.

children.name: Transcript
children.content: “Figure out how to submit the Tankwa land-use permit and add the steps to my permit task.”

children.name: Q
children.content: “How to submit the Tankwa Karoo land-use permit”

children.name: T
children.content: Append research notes to this task

children.name: T
children.content: Phrasing can be strict & terse — the mission scope plus the agent resolve the rest.

children.name: Scope
children.content: Web research · finding required steps & official sources

children.name: BSub
children.content: You can leave — we’ll notify you the moment results are ready.

children.name: BindTxt
children.content: Findings will be appended as notes on this task when research completes.

children.name: CapTxt
children.content: MINIMIZED STATE — DOCKS HERE WHEN YOU LEAVE

children.name: Target
children.content: Target: 18 Apr 2026 · CapeNature regional office · Mission: AfrikaBurn 2026

children.name: Summary
children.content: Tankwa land-use happens through CapeNature — submit the regional land-use application with the AfrikaBurn event letter, settle the SARS levy, then await the gate-access permit. Allow ~10 working days.

children.name: Txt
children.content: Open the CapeNature land-use application portal and select the Tankwa Karoo regional office as the responsible authority.

children.name: Txt
children.content: Attach the AfrikaBurn 2026 official event authorisation letter plus the participant land-use motivation form.

children.name: Txt
children.content: Pay the environmental impact assessment levy via SARS eFiling and retain the payment reference (PRN).

children.name: Txt
children.content: Submit the completed application at least 10 working days before the target date to clear regional review.

children.name: Txt
children.content: On approval, download the gate-access permit and record the permit number against this task.

children.name: Body
children.content: Tankwa land-use permit · notes appended to task

children.name: Subtitle
children.content: Task Agent — recovery states for failed, uncertain and partial research

children.name: Body
children.content: Couldn’t find reliable steps. Try rephrasing or narrowing the request.

children.name: Body
children.content: I’m not fully sure this is the task you meant. Confirm before I apply these steps.

children.name: Body
children.content: More than one task matches your request. Tap the one you meant.

children.name: Body
children.content: Couldn’t reach the research service. Check your connection and try again.

children.name: Body

children.name: Body
children.content: This is still running. Keep it going in the background, or come back later — we’ll notify you when it’s done.

children.name: Body
children.content: Added 3 notes — 2 sources were unreachable. You can retry the ones that failed.

children.name: Body
children.content: Voice capture failed. Allow microphone access to dictate your request.

children.name: Transcript
children.content: “Figure out how to submit the Tankwa land-use permit and add the steps to my permit task.”

children.name: V
children.content: How to submit the Tankwa Karoo land-use permit

children.name: V
children.content: Append research notes to this task

children.name: Hint
children.content: Phrasing can be terse — the mission scope + agent resolve the rest.

children.name: Body
children.content: 2 tasks match “permit” in this mission. Pick the one to attach research to:

children.name: T
children.content: Running in the background — you can leave. We’ll notify you when it’s ready.

children.name: Summary
children.content: The Tankwa Karoo land-use permit is issued by CapeNature. Apply at least 30 days before arrival and carry the PDF to the gate.

children.name: T
children.content: Create a CapeNature online profile and start a new land-use application. [1]

children.name: T
children.content: Upload your ID, vehicle details and AfrikaBurn ticket confirmation. [2]

children.name: T
children.content: Pay the R150 conservation levy by EFT and attach proof of payment.

children.name: T
children.content: Submit at least 30 days before 27 Apr 2026 to allow processing. [1]

children.name: T
children.content: Save the emailed permit PDF — you must show it at the Tankwa gate. [3]
